title: mizii 6Pcs Burgundy Wisteria Hanging Flowers 48" Silk Wisteria Artificial Flowers Garland Vines Fake Hanging Flowers Decoration for Wedding Flower Wall Backdrop Centerpieces Room Decor (Burgundy)
features: Artificial Wisteria Garland - Packaging includes 6pcs wisteria hanging flowers, Each hanging flower measures 48 inches in total and has approximately 76 wisteria flowers.

Silk Flower - The leaves and petals of these fake wisteria flowers are made of silk, the stem is made of iron wire and wrapped in plastic, it is soft and strong, you can bend or trim its stem to the length you want.

Ideal Flowers for Decoration - These artificial hanging flowers can be used for wedding decor, centerpieces decor, room decor, vase decor, wall decor, backdrop decor, flower arrangements, Infuse indoor and outdoor scenes with the natural beauty of flowers.
Advantages - (Flowers Decor Solution) Faux wisteria hanging flowers do not worrying about insects, and the material is safe and odorless, uv resistant, not easy to fade and it can be reused.
Brilliant Colors - This wisteria flowers comes in 6 colors: white, pink, royal blue, purple, burgundy, and yellow, which can be suitable for decoration in various themes.
description: Product: Artificial Wisteria Hanging Flowers. Material: Silk. Quantity: 6 pcs. Color: White Pink Royal Blue Burgundy Yellow Purple. Length of Product: 48 inches.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Flower Wall Backdrop, Home Decor, Outdoor Decor, Wedding Decor
